title: Asana official work management positioning
claim: Asana frames itself as a work management platform that connects company goals to execution with workflow views and broad cross-functional coordination.
source_snippet: The product page centers on scalable work management, goals alignment, and faster execution across teams.
implication: ProductOS should treat work-management platforms as strong execution baselines and focus V5 on traceability through discovery and decision gates.
followup_questions: How much PM discovery context can Asana expose without bespoke project conventions?
